the eye was removed.jpeg.caption: Popped her eyeball right out and she was fully awake for it

stab.jpeg.caption: Multiple stabs, all in one spot... blood was gushing out like crazy. I dragged him somewhere else so they wouldn't find him too quick. Let the maggots have their feast

an axe stuck in the head.jpeg.caption: That was pure gold. Made me wanna do it again and again. I dig those who fight for life till their last breath—man, he really wanted to live. Wastin' him was pure bliss."

a body in a bag.jpeg.caption: Her face was swollen all over from the beating... she was literally begging me to put her out of her misery

fingers were cut off.jpeg.caption: i just didn't like his fingers so i cut them off

corpse in the plastic bag.jpeg.caption: That kid choked out way too fast and died before I even got to enjoy it. Let's ditch the bags What should we try next?

hanging corpse.jpeg.caption: Suffocating her with the plastic bag was an absolute blast Then hanging her upside down in barbed wire... shit looked painful as hell Girl wasn't even dead yet when I flipped her She was straight-up begging for death, but I craved watching her suffocate in that bag

cut with a saw.jpeg.caption: Yeah that saw work is beautiful  I’m hooked on it too Hearing 'em scream... it’s like music drilled straight into my ears

no head in the saw.jpeg.caption: I sliced him straight in half with the saw  Man was losing his mind screaming bloody murder
